data.title: Jolimark Sets 2026 AGM to Renew Mandates and Expand Share Issuance Authority
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Jolimark Holdings ( (HK:2028) ) has issued an update.

Jolimark Holdings has convened its annual general meeting for 28 May 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will be asked to adopt the audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025, re-elect two executive directors and one independent non-executive director, and approve the remuneration of both the board and the external auditors. The meeting will also seek shareholder authorisation for the board to issue new shares and resell treasury shares up to 20% of the company’s issued share capital, a standard mandate that preserves financial flexibility for future fundraising, capital management and potential strategic initiatives without requiring separate approvals for each transaction.

If approved, the re-election of directors will maintain continuity in Jolimark’s leadership and governance structure, while the re-appointment of Gary Cheng CPA Limited as auditors reinforces consistency in the company’s audit oversight. The broad share issuance mandate, bounded by Hong Kong listing rules and the company’s articles, could affect future capital structure and shareholder dilution, underscoring the importance for investors to monitor how and when the board may exercise these powers over the coming year.

More about Jolimark Holdings

Jolimark Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and traded under stock code 2028. The group operates through a corporate structure that includes subsidiaries, with its governance and reporting overseen by a board of directors and external auditors based in Hong Kong.

YTD Price Performance: 34.18%

Average Trading Volume: 455,750

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$64.97M

data.title: Maven Renovar VCT offers 12% tender ahead of shift to AIM Plus strategy
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Amati AIM ( (GB:MRV) ).

Maven Renovar VCT PLC has launched a tender offer to return up to 12 per cent of its issued share capital to investors, giving shareholders a cash exit ahead of a proposed shift to an “AIM Plus” strategy. The offer, to be voted on at a May general meeting, allows eligible investors to tender all their shares, though purchases will be capped at 12 per cent of the register and may be scaled back if over-subscribed.

Shares accepted under the tender will be bought at a 3.5 per cent discount to net asset value, a level the board expects to be at a premium to the prevailing market price and to avoid material NAV dilution for those remaining invested. The buyback, executed via Shore Capital and funded from distributable reserves, underscores the company’s effort to balance strategic repositioning with liquidity for dissenting holders while excluding investors in certain restricted overseas jurisdictions for regulatory reasons.

More about Amati AIM

Maven Renovar VCT PLC is a UK-listed venture capital trust investing in smaller, growth-oriented companies, with a focus on quoted and AIM-related strategies. The board is considering shifting to an “AIM Plus” investment approach, targeting an expanded universe of AIM and complementary assets to enhance returns for shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 20,630

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: icetana AI lifts recurring revenue and expands market reach with on-premises security AI launch
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

iCetana Ltd. ( (AU:ICE) ) has issued an announcement.

icetana AI reported strong growth for the March 2026 quarter, with annual recurring revenue rising to $2.6 million, up 12% quarter-on-quarter and 51% year-on-year, and total quarterly revenue increasing 40% year-on-year to $607,000. The company’s net operating cash outflow widened to $1.2 million and its quarter-end cash balance declined to $1.0 million, though a further $705,000 was received in April from a customer, easing near-term liquidity pressure.

Management attributed the ARR momentum to new customer wins and expansion sales, supported by heightened safety concerns driving demand for on-site protection. The launch of Antara Core, an on-premises AI security workflow suite, opens a significant market segment that cloud-based AI cannot serve, potentially strengthening icetana AI’s competitive position as it seeks to scale revenue, deepen customer relationships and broaden its global partner network.

More about iCetana Ltd.

icetana Ltd., trading as icetana AI, develops self-learning security artificial intelligence software aimed at large-scale surveillance networks. Its products deliver AI-powered security workflows, including the newly launched Antara Core on-premises solution, targeting organisations with strict data sovereignty requirements and growing global demand for private, scalable AI in security operations.

Average Trading Volume: 132,455

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$18.61M

IG Group Holdings ( (GB:IGG) ) has shared an announcement.

IG Group Holdings has continued its share buyback activity, purchasing 162,551 ordinary shares between 20 and 24 April 2026 through Morgan Stanley & Co. International at volume-weighted average prices ranging from 1,509.04p to 1,536.53p. The company intends to hold these shares in treasury, supporting capital management flexibility and potentially enhancing earnings per share over time.

Following the latest transactions, IG Group now holds 29,859,755 ordinary shares in treasury and has 331,698,113 ordinary shares in issue, excluding treasury stock. Since 1 April 2026, the group has repurchased a total of 532,376 shares at an aggregate cost of about £7.95m, underscoring an ongoing commitment to returning capital to shareholders and managing its equity base.

data.description:

Metro Mining Limited ( (AU:MMI) ) has provided an update.

Metro Mining has invited its shareholders to a webinar presentation where its CEO and CFO will discuss the company’s January to March 2026 quarterly report, with the session to be held on 28 April and a recording to be made available on the company’s website. The event underscores Metro Mining’s emphasis on transparency and investor engagement as it advances operations at its Bauxite Hills Mine, a key supplier of high alumina bauxite supporting aluminium demand linked to the global energy transition.

By highlighting its operational footprint in Cape York and economic contribution to Far North Queensland, including strong Indigenous employment and agreements with Traditional Owners, Metro reinforces its social licence to operate alongside its commercial ambitions. The webinar provides stakeholders an opportunity to gain deeper insight into recent performance and outlook in a market where bauxite and aluminium remain strategically important commodities.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MMI) stock is a Buy with a A$0.15 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Metro Mining Limited stock, see the AU:MMI Stock Forecast page.

More about Metro Mining Limited

Metro Mining Limited is an independent Australian bauxite producer and explorer focused on supplying high alumina bauxite, the key ore used to make aluminium, a metal in strong demand for the energy transition. The company operates the 100% owned Bauxite Hills Mine on the Weipa bauxite plateau in Far North Queensland, shipping ore directly to customers in very large carriers while maintaining agreements with Traditional Owners and employing a high proportion of Indigenous workers.

Cosmos Machinery Enterprises Limited ( (HK:0118) ) has shared an update.

Cosmos Machinery Enterprises Limited has called its annual general meeting for 17 June 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will review the audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and the reports of the board and independent auditors. The meeting will also consider the re-election of independent non-executive directors, the reappointment of HLB Hodgson Impey Cheng Limited as auditor, and a mandate allowing the board to issue up to 20% of the company’s share capital, potentially providing additional funding flexibility and reinforcing standard corporate governance practices.

Shareholders will vote on authorising directors to fix their own remuneration and the auditor’s fees, aligning with customary AGM business for Hong Kong–listed firms. The proposed general mandate to allot and issue additional shares, excluding treasury shares and subject to specific exceptions such as rights issues and option schemes, would enable the company to respond more nimbly to capital-raising or strategic opportunities while maintaining regulatory limits designed to protect existing investors from excessive dilution.

More about Cosmos Machinery Enterprises Limited

Cosmos Machinery Enterprises Limited is a Hong Kong–incorporated company listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong, operating in the machinery and related industrial sector. The group focuses on manufacturing and supplying machinery and equipment, serving industrial customers in Hong Kong and broader regional markets.

The meeting’s resolutions, particularly the dividend decision and the renewed share issue mandate, will influence capital allocation and funding flexibility for future growth initiatives. data.title: Capcom Hikes Earnings and Dividend Forecast on Strong Game and Catalog Sales
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Capcom Co ( (JP:9697) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Capcom has raised its full-year consolidated forecast for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, citing stronger-than-expected performance across its businesses. The company now expects net sales of ¥195.3 billion, operating profit of ¥75.2 billion, and net profit attributable to owners of the parent of ¥54.5 billion, all above its prior guidance and exceeding the previous year’s results.

Management attributed the upgrade primarily to the global success of Resident Evil Requiem and robust catalog sales from major series in its core Digital Contents segment, alongside favorable results in Arcade Operations, Amusement Equipments, and other businesses. Reflecting this stronger earnings outlook, Capcom also raised its year-end dividend forecast from ¥20 to ¥25 per share, lifting the full-year dividend projection to ¥45 and signaling increased shareholder returns on the back of sustained profit growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9697) stock is a Buy with a Yen4600.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Capcom Co stock, see the JP:9697 Stock Forecast page.

More about Capcom Co

Capcom Co., Ltd. is a Japanese video game publisher and developer best known for global franchises such as Resident Evil. The company’s core Digital Contents business is complemented by Arcade Operations, Amusement Equipments, and other entertainment segments, giving it a diversified revenue base within the interactive entertainment industry.

The latest update is out from BH Macro Shs GBP ( (GB:BHMG) ).

BH Macro Limited has repurchased 11,410 U.S. dollar ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange at a weighted average price of 4.3600, and intends to hold these shares in treasury. Following this transaction, the company reports 305,149,519 Sterling shares and 24,054,376 U.S. dollar shares in issue excluding treasury, with total voting rights standing at 467,170,701, indicating an ongoing capital management strategy that can influence liquidity, share price support, and shareholder value.

The updated capital structure includes 72,528,579 Sterling shares and 556,443 U.S. dollar shares held in treasury, which may be used for future corporate purposes such as managing discount control or funding share-based activity. This active use of share buybacks and treasury holdings underlines the company’s efforts to manage its share base flexibly in response to market conditions, a practice closely watched by investors in closed-ended funds for its impact on trading dynamics and net asset value per share.

Spark’s Take on BHMG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BHMG is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by a very strong balance sheet (no debt) but held back by inconsistent earnings/cash flow history. Weak technical momentum and a high P/E further constrain the rating, while ongoing buybacks provide only a modest offset.
